bar Control Algorithms for Soft Walls Adam Cataldo Master's Report, Technical Memorandum UCB/ERL M03/42 , University of California, Berkeley, CA 94720, January 21, 2004. ABSTRACT In response to the Septemer 11, 2001 hijackings, Edward Lee porposed a

eptemer 11, 2001 hijackings, Edward Lee porposed a new flight-control technology called Soft Walls. The Soft Walls strategy is to store a 3D database of "no-fly zones", or restirected airspace, on-board each aircraft and enforce these no-fly zones

oard each aircraft and enforce these no-fly zones using an avionics control system. This master's report documents two of the Soft Walls control algorithms we have tried. Contact Update Help Update Copyright © 1999 - UC Regents; all rights reserved.
